problem_solved: Provides clinical data collection and audit platforms for rheumatology departments and medical societies. Their CaseCapture platform enables large-scale national audits like the British Society for Rheumatology's National Early Inflammatory Arthritis Audit (NEIAA).
who_buys_it: Medical societies, NHS trusts, clinical audit teams, research institutions
key_features: CaseCapture - cloud-based clinical data collection platform
Real-time data validation and quality checks
National audit reporting and benchmarking dashboards
why_varden_should_care: Proven model for national clinical audits in rheumatology; replicable for other chronic disease registries and specialty-specific data collection needs across Europe

problem_solved: Digitizes physiotherapy and MSK care delivery through exercise prescription, remote monitoring, and telehealth. Helps clinicians manage musculoskeletal conditions including arthritis with personalized home exercise programs.
who_buys_it: Physiotherapy clinics, NHS trusts, private MSK providers, occupational health services
key_features: 18,000+ video exercise library with AI-assisted program building
PhysiApp patient app for exercise adherence tracking and pain monitoring
Integrated telehealth video consultations and outcome measurement
business_model: SaaS - tiered subscription based on number of clinicians
why_varden_should_care: Strong product-market fit in MSK/rheumatology; proven model for remote patient engagement that could be replicated for other chronic conditions requiring ongoing physical therapy

problem_solved: Enables remote patient monitoring for chronic conditions including rheumatoid arthritis. Helps clinicians identify health deterioration early and manage patients outside traditional care settings through virtual wards.
who_buys_it: NHS trusts, private hospitals, health insurers, community care providers
key_features: Risk-stratified patient monitoring dashboard
Virtual ward and health screening capabilities
Multi-condition monitoring including chronic inflammatory diseases
business_model: SaaS - subscription-based remote patient monitoring platform
why_varden_should_care: NHS-proven RPM platform with 826% ROI; replicable model for chronic disease management across multiple conditions beyond rheumatology

problem_solved: Provides digital-first healthcare access including remote consultations for chronic disease management. Partners with NHS and private insurers to deliver video GP appointments and integrated care pathways.
who_buys_it: NHS trusts, health insurers, employers, government health systems
key_features: Video consultation platform with integrated EHR
Capitated care management for large populations
Multi-specialty referral pathways including rheumatology
business_model: B2B - contracts with NHS, insurers, and employers; SaaS licensing
why_varden_should_care: Europe's largest digital-first healthcare provider; demonstrates scalable telehealth model that could incorporate specialized rheumatology pathways

problem_solved: Digital treatment for osteoarthritis and chronic joint pain through app-based physiotherapy programs. Reduces need for surgery and pain medication through evidence-based exercise therapy.
key_features: Personalized digital exercise programs with physiotherapist support
46% average pain reduction within 12 weeks
Integration with physical clinic network for hybrid care
business_model: B2B/B2C - reimbursed by health systems; direct subscription for patients
why_varden_should_care: Proven clinical outcomes for arthritis treatment; replicable digital therapeutic model for other musculoskeletal and chronic inflammatory conditions

problem_solved: Digital therapeutics platform for musculoskeletal pain management. Provides AI-powered motion analysis and multimodal treatment programs for back pain, joint pain, and related conditions.
who_buys_it: Employers, health plans, health systems, patients
key_features: AI-powered motion analysis for exercise feedback
Multimodal treatment combining exercise, education, and mind-body
3x ROI demonstrated in claims studies with Fortune 150 companies
business_model: B2B - employer and health plan contracts; value-based pricing
why_varden_should_care: Strong evidence base with 11 clinical trials; demonstrates how digital therapeutics can replace traditional MSK care pathways with measurable cost savings

problem_solved: AI-powered digital MSK care combining human clinical specialists with AI personalization. Treats pain, prevents surgery, and improves outcomes for joint and muscle conditions including arthritis.
key_features: Hybrid model: AI Care Specialist + Human Clinical Specialist
3.2:1 independently validated gross savings ratio
67% of members become pain-free; 50% reduction in surgeries
business_model: B2B - employer and health plan contracts; outcome-based pricing
why_varden_should_care: Industry-leading clinical outcomes and ROI validation; demonstrates premium digital MSK care model that could be adapted for rheumatology-specific conditions
